item.title: Advice for staying in the hospital for a week
item.description: Hard-won wisdom from a week of fluorescent lights and beeping machines.

item.title: The Unbound Scepter
item.description: My post-surgery medication stack gave me the most on-the-nose dream of my life.

item.title: Killing my inner Necron
item.description: On surviving surgery, confronting mortality, and finding peace on the other side.

item.title: Portable monitors are good
item.description: A review of portable monitors for travel

item.title: Life Update: On medical leave
item.description: Taking some time off for medical reasons until early April

item.title: The Discourse has been Automated
item.description: An AI agent submitted a PR to matplotlib, got rejected, and then wrote a callout blogpost attacking the maintainer. I have no idea how to feel about this.

item.title: Matrix ain't it chief
item.description: Watch arathorn get in the replies for this one.

item.title: Humanity's last programming language
item.description: What if markdown was executable? You get markdownlang.

item.title: Zendesk, get your shit together please
item.description: BORN TO GET SPAMMED, WORLD IS A FUCK, SPAMHAUS THEM ALL 2026, I am inbox full man, 410,757,864,530 Zendesk emails
